name: One Time Migration
description: Initial transfer of all selected data from Google Chat (source) to Microsoft Teams (destination). Includes channels (mapped from spaces), direct messages, files, supported permissions, and metadata. Preserves message history, user attribution, and channel structure.

name: Delta Migration
description: Incremental transfer of new or updated data from Google Chat to Microsoft Teams after the One-Time Migration. Keeps the destination synchronized with the source.

name: Public Spaces
description: All public Google Chat spaces are migrated with complete message history, files, reactions, and metadata. Public spaces created with Collaboration or Announcements purpose are supported. Migrated as Private spaces.

name: Non-Admin Public Spaces
description: Public spaces where the admin is not a member are supported and migrated, ensuring full environment coverage.

name: Private Spaces
description: Private Spaces are migrated while preserving access restrictions and message confidentiality.

name: Non-Admin Private Spaces
description: Private spaces where the admin does not have direct access are supported and migrated using backend permissions.

name: Space Members
description: All Space members are correctly mapped and added in the destination space with preserved permissions.

name: Space Mentions
description: Space mention (name of space mentioned inside a message to reference that space) is supported.

name: Tagged Space Mentions
description: Tagged Space Mention (to notify all members or active members of a space at once) is supported.

name: User Mentions
description: User mentions (@username) are migrated, except for unmapped users.

name: Members Posted Username
description: Displays the original message author to maintain attribution.

name: Group DMs
description: Migrates multi-user direct message conversations securely.

name: One-on-One DMs
description: All one-to-one conversations are migrated with timestamps and message attribution.

name: Non-Admin One-on-One DMs
description: Direct messages where the admin is not involved are supported and migrated.

name: Non-Admin Group DMs
description: Group DMs where the admin is not a participant are supported and migrated.

name: Members Posted Username (DMs)
description: The original sender information is retained for all migrated direct messages.

name: DM Members
description: All participants in direct and group DMs are correctly mapped and added in Microsoft Teams.

name: User Mentions in DMs
description: User mentions within direct messages are migrated, preserving the original context.

name: Bullet List
description: Bullet list formatting is maintained.

name: Bold
description: Bold formatting is maintained.

name: Italic
description: Italic formatting is maintained.

name: Strike Through
description: Strikethrough formatting is maintained.

name: Underline
description: Underline is not maintained.

name: Code Block
description: Code block formatting is maintained.

name: Audio Message
description: Audio messages are supported.

name: Video Message
description: Video messages are supported.

name: Emojis
description: Emojis are preserved.

name: Links
description: Link is migrated as normal text. Hyperlinks are supported.

name: All Types of Files
description: All supported file types are migrated.

name: Files Posted from It is shared with me, It is starred
description: Files posted from shared/starred (from uploading) are supported.

name: Files Posted Using Created Doc, Created Slides, meeting link
description: Migrated as file along with links same from source to destination.

name: GIFs
description: Animated GIFs are preserved. Migrated as GIFs.

name: Stickers
description: Stickers are migrated as GIFs.
